importantInfo.title: Q3 Goal Setting
importantInfo.body: Q3 is right around the corner. If your clinic director hasn't asked for your Q3 Good, Better, and Best goals yet, please send them as soon as possible.

importantInfo.title: Check your ABNs !
importantInfo.body: Please make sure your ABN charge (97139) is getting the check mark on your checkout screen and is not crossed out when you are sending your note/claim to the billing department. We are seeing an increase in claims going out with the ABN charge, but the ABN charge is crossed out or greyed out on the checkout screen, so the ABN charge doesn't actually get applied to the patient.

importantInfo.title: Marketing Team Needs CE Contacts
importantInfo.body: Krista, Winnie, and Peyton are building community contacts near each clinic. If a patient works somewhere that could benefit from our services, get the HR rep's contact info.

importantInfo.title: Existing Patient Evaluation Tracking
importantInfo.body: Soon we'll start tracking scheduling-out scores for re-evals (EP - Initial Evaluation appt type). Please treat re-evals like new patients & educate on tissue healing times, set expectations for a 4-6 week treatment plan, and let them know you are the quarterback of their care.

importantInfo.title: Flex Schedule Criteria Perk Updates
importantInfo.body: Providers may now flex their schedule during a PTO week if they maintain a current YTD average of 50+ treatments per week. Refer to the flex schedule manual for the full explanation of the perk.

importantInfo.title: Changes for Part-Time Teammates
importantInfo.body: The bonus threshold for part-time teammates is now 70% (previously 75%). Reminder: part-time = fewer than 35 clinic hours/week. Benefits eligibility requires at least 30 clinic hours/week.

importantInfo.title: Communicate 1-Offs for Schedule-Out Tracking
importantInfo.body:
If a new patient couldn't schedule out for a legitimate reason, email Ryan Macan at ryan@fitmjc.com. Without that communication, it shows as a missed schedule-out.

Legitimate reasons include:
1. Patient not local / just visiting KC
2. A red flag or emergency requiring an ER referral

importantInfo.title: Patient Re-Engagement Campaign
importantInfo.body: Your re-engagement campaign spreadsheet should be complete. If it isn't, get it done ASAP. Be on the lookout for a follow-up email from your CD with next steps.

importantInfo.title: Update on Sports Medicine Team
importantInfo.body: Matt Dobratz is building F.I.T.'s sports medicine team and finishing the curriculum. Interested in joining? Reach out to him at matthew@fitmjc.com.

importantInfo.title: New Personal Appointment Types / Colors
importantInfo.body:
Prompt 10.0 now supports color coding for schedule blocks.

Lunch Break = Pink
NP Access Blocks = Green
Monthly Check-in / Meeting / Yearly Review = Turquoise
CE Block = Yellow
L10 Meeting = Khaki

importantInfo.title: Community Partners
importantInfo.body: Not everyone knows who their community partners are. The full list is on SharePoint. Reach out to any partner you haven't heard from recently and set up a CE event!

importantInfo.title: Building and Maintaining a Full Schedule
importantInfo.body:
If your visit count was below your weekly average, reflect on:

1. If you were out, how can we better ensure your patients stay on track?
2. If patients were traveling, how can we anticipate those gaps?

importantInfo.title: Case Overview Dashboard / Old Patients
importantInfo.body:
Use the Case Overview Dashboard weekly to go through open cases, reach out to patients who haven't been in, update treatment plans, or discharge inactive cases.

https://support.promptemr.com/article/704-the-active-cases-dashboard-tool

importantInfo.title: Next Events
importantInfo.body:
- July 16th @ 12pm: Dr. Jakoi, Spine Surgeon, Presentation via in person at BV or Zoom
- October 24/25: ICE: Extremity Management
- Check your corporate challenge event dates and plan ahead!

importantInfo.title: PCC / Admin Reminders
importantInfo.body:
1. Dashboard: Review Eligibility, Intake Conflicts, and Benefits Verification
2. Demographics: Gender is required so please ensure it's filled out for all patients
3. Referring Providers: Must be entered on each Case for Plan of Care and Medicare processing

importantInfo.title: POC
importantInfo.body: If a new patient cancels or no-call no-shows, please email referrals.

importantInfo.title: Provider Daily Rocks
importantInfo.body:
Use your downtime wisely - every provider has 3 daily rocks:

1. Deliver exceptional one-on-one care
2. Build trusting relationships via community engagement
3. Complete billing & documentation in a timely manner

importantInfo.title: Patient Experience Tip
importantInfo.body: If your treatment table is ripping or has holes, contact Dilyn to coordinate reupholstering.
